title: lutar-lean — Lean 4 formalization of the Lutar Invariant Λ-uniqueness conjecture (Conjecture 1)
description: Lean 4 + Mathlib formalization of the four-axiom characterization (A1 monotone, A2 homogeneous, A3 Egyptian-exact, A4 bounded) of the Lutar Invariant Λ_k as the weighted geometric mean with Egyptian unit-fraction weights. Machine-checked statements for the Λ-uniqueness conjecture (Conjecture 1 — proof-deferred, pending closure of CAUCHY_ND sorry) and the min/max bound (Theorem 2). Also provides a runtime parity check between the Lean Float implementation and the production TypeScript runtime (szl-holdings/ouroboros) on a curated set of reference vectors. Companion artefact to the Ouroboros Thesis (concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19944926); the v9 paper (10.5281/zenodo.20053148) introduces the unified operational account of the Lutar Invariant family that this proof scaffolds. NOTE: Λ-uniqueness is Conjecture 1 — NEVER theorem — per SZL Doctrine v11.
